---
name: Bug report
about:
  Report a problem in the repository site, documentation, or published
  artifacts.
title: "[Bug] "
labels: [bug, documentation]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

What is broken or incorrect?

## Location

Link the file, page, or section where the issue appears.

## Expected behavior

Describe what should happen instead.

## Actual behavior

Describe what currently happens.

## Additional context

Add screenshots, links, or reproduction notes if useful.
